arts.ttl: New images from Stamford Bridge show nearly an entire row of seats were torn out by travelling Gent supporters during chaotic Conference League clash with Chelsea
arts.sum: The action off the field often threatened to eclipse the exhibition of creative football on it, with frequent verbal exchanges between the sets of supporters at times boiling over into more serious incidents

arts.ttl: Football fans name the Nottingham Forest player they think will man-mark Cole Palmer vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest fans all want Ryan Yates to man-mark Cole Palmer ahead of the trip to Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Many Chelsea fans urge Enzo Maresca to give player a rare league start this season vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Chelsea are preparing to host Nottingham Forest tomorrow afternoon in the Premier League, and the fanbase has suggested that Enzo Maresca make a big call...

arts.ttl: Chelsea coaches “very worried” by signing’s lack of development
arts.sum: Chelsea’s first-team coaches are concerned by Kendry Paez’s lack of development. The Blues signed the 17-year-old last summer following an impressive season which saw the youngster contribute to 12 goals from 32 appearances. Agreeing to a deal worth a reported £17.3 million with Ecuadorian side Independiente del Valle, Chelsea are set to welcome the teenager […] The post Chelsea coaches “very worried” by signing’s lack of development appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Romano: Chelsea 'really close' to signing striker better than Haaland
arts.sum: Chelsea were 'really, really, really close' to signing Jhon Duran in the summer, according to Fabrizio Romano. "Against Bayern, he scored the winner on a historical night for Aston Villa, but Jhon Duran was actually really, really, really close to becoming a new Chelsea player at some point over the summer transfer window," Romano told CaughtOffside .

arts.ttl: John Terry shows true Chelsea colours with three-word Man Utd dig
arts.sum: While Terry was at the club Chelsea won five Premier League titles, five FA Cups, three League Cups, the Europa League and the Champions League . Terry would go on to make up for it in 2012, lifting the Champions League trophy finally, despite being suspended for the final against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: 'I did not see coming': ESPN pundit really surprised by how well £32m Chelsea star is playing this season
arts.sum: Shaka Hislop admits that he’s been shocked by how well one Chelsea player has started this season under Enzo Maresca. It’s been a really encouraging...

arts.ttl: Nico Williams remains coy on future amid Barcelona, Arsenal and Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Nico Williams has insisted he's 'happy' at Atletico Club after snubbing interest from Barcelona, Chelsea and Arsenal during the summer transfer window. “I’m happy in Bilbao, I’ve decided to stay here," said Williams.

arts.ttl: Report shares the two key words Nuno always repeats to his Nottingham Forest players

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Nottingham Forest.
